title: The Noland Legend Returns
description: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
scene: Across pages 7, 8, 9, 10, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Chopper, Bellamy, Masira, Shojo. The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: His name was Momblanc Mont Blanc Cricket.

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Alright! It's time for the "Search Sonar!"

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Let's have some grilled fish tonight, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But I don't think it's "him," Usopp.

summary: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
